items.name: GenRec-SID
items.description: Empirical study on catalog-size scaling laws for generative sequential recommendation. Motivated by significant performance degradation when scaling MiniOneRec to larger candidate sets. Features RQ-VAE Semantic IDs, constrained beam search, multi-task SFT, and GRPO RL. Preliminary validation with limited compute — HR@10 follows power-law decay
